framework.name: Offline Root / Online Delegate Architecture
framework.description: The 'offline root, online delegates' pattern is a live production architecture where a hardware-secured master key never transacts directly — it only authorizes short-lived derivative keys with constrained scopes. This is bearer-credential delegation: the session key IS the portable spending authority, no callback required.
framework.raw_quote: Keep the master seed in x402 and authorize time-bound session keys for bots and microservices. Rotate keys on schedule, and revoke on incident.

source.title: x402 in Action: Real Use Cases for Developers and AI Startups
